test_suite.details: Ran node test.js in fresh clone (/tmp/dome-integrity-clone): 3373 passed, 0 failed. Workspace copy shows 1 failure ('HTML is not stale') — this is a FUSE-side artifact because the workspace docs/index.html (mtime 02:29) is older than the workspace data/wins.json (mtime 06:35). Git side (the published site) is in sync.

internal_anchors.details: All href="#id" targets resolve to existing id= attributes (0 broken). showTab('overview') resolves to the default-active tab. Nav bar references only real tabs. TOC links resolve.

tab_structure.details: 12 tab-content divs (overview is active on load; other 11 appear in the nav bar as expected). All have unique IDs. All nav-bar showTab() targets match a real tab div. sectionNav helper is no longer present in the rendered HTML (prev/next chain removed in an earlier UX refactor) — this is a known divergence from the prompt's check #1 sub-bullet; navigation relies on the top tab bar.

external_links.details: Enumerated 68 non-DOI external links across hosts (noaa.gov, nasa.gov, esa.int, intermagnet.org, jpl.nasa.gov, github.com, wikipedia, etc.). No live-fetch validation this run — agent lacks web tooling in current environment. Prior runs have validated these same hosts. Citation DOI links deliberately skipped (curmudgeon's responsibility).

data_prose_consistency.details: Scorecard verdict counts (Refuted=9, Self-Contradicted=14, Misleading=22, Std Model Explains=18, Not Demonstrated=4, Unfalsifiable=4 = 71 total) match wins.json exactly. All 71 WINs have tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict. The scorecard's '69' card is the dome author's claimed count (V51.1), not our review count — this is intentional. uncounted-failures.json has 8 entries and HTML reports '8 acknowledged'.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 71 WINs in wins.json have detail panel content rendered. No missing tldr_evidence/tldr_verdict. Verdict color classes render correctly.

win_alignment_dome_site.details: Dome-site fetch not performed this run (no web tooling loaded). Last alignment check (2026-04-17) reported 69 confirmed / PROS alias tracked and clean.

progressive_disclosure.details: 11 of 110 H2 headings in sections.json render outside <details>. All 11 are legitimate top-level category/section headers in part3 (WIN details tab) — e.g., '3.1 Verdict Summary Table', '3.2 Detailed: Refuted by Data', '3.5 Detailed: Not Demonstrated'. These act as structural separators inside the tab, not collapsible content. No regression vs prior runs.

theme_color_drift.details: 2 hardcoded light-theme color literals in data/sections.json: (1) part1.html: background:#f5f5f5 inside a monospace formula block showing the WGS84 g(r,φ) equation, (2) part6.html: background:#fff inside a Tesla patent image card. Both are repeat offenders from prior reports; not critical but visibly inconsistent with the dark theme.

discoverability.details: docs/llms.txt present and current (references 69 claims V51.1 plus sub-entries, matching dome-site count framing); docs/sitemap.xml valid XML with main-page + llms.txt entries; docs/robots.txt has Allow:/ and Sitemap: directive; <head> contains description, og:title, og:description, and a ClaimReview ld+json block. uncounted-failures.json is schema-valid (8 entries, no duplicate IDs, all required fields).

expansion_tracker.details: next_id=182 > max_id=181 — OK, no allocation collision imminent. 180 items total. 170 EXP-prefixed files on disk, all matched to tracker entries (0 orphans). 0 phantom tracker entries (every status:complete with output_file points to an existing file). 0 stale-pending items (none older than 48h). ID gap: EXP-052 is absent from the tracker sequence (items jump 051→053). No evidence of collision or lost work — likely an allocation skip; flag for decider acknowledgement.

workspace_only_files.details: Workspace-only (not yet in git): monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/WIN-019.c3.json (08:14 today, <30min old), WIN-020.c3.json (09:11 today, <5min old), monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-182.json (09:04 today, <15min old). These are fresh agent outputs; workspace-sync runs every 4h and should capture them on next cycle. Older concern: monitor/prompts/reference/analyst-mode5-prospective.md (Apr 12) exists on workspace but never committed. No prompt references 'Mode 5' so the document is effectively orphaned documentation — low practical risk but worth committing or deleting.

section_new_coupling.details: All section-new and category-proposal-writeup tracker items are represented in priority-queue.json (0 decoupled).

workspace_sync_skip_log.details: Last 24h: 0 direction-violation skips, 26 mtime-guard skips (informational — normal operation). Mtime-guard paths: category-proposals/CAT-005.json (7x), expansion-tracker.json (6x), daily-report-2026-04-14T23-13.json (7x), review-state.json (6x). All expected for multi-writer files where the decider writes directly via git.

digest_pipeline.details: Regenerated pending-digest.json; 0 parse errors. Digest reports: Total reviews=196, Processed=282, Pending=1. Unprocessed (base-ID dedup): 0 of 203. Digest coverage clean.

claude_md_file_map.details: All spot-checked file paths (build.js, data/*.json, monitor/prompts/*.md for the 8 agents) exist. Reference directory contains 20 files; all agent-referenced references exist. No hardcoded counts detected in CLAUDE.md mechanical sweep.

build_reproducibility.details: Fresh clone (/tmp/dome-integrity-clone) at commit 2fa4b57. Ran `node build.js html`. `git status` reports 'nothing to commit, working tree clean' — the regenerated docs/index.html is byte-identical to the committed one. Published site matches source data exactly.

issues_found.description: Hardcoded light-theme background #f5f5f5 in a monospace formula block.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Replace 'background: #f5f5f5' with 'background: var(--card-bg)' (and 'border-left: 3px solid #666' with a theme-aware variable).

issues_found.description: Hardcoded white background #fff on a Tesla patent image card.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Replace 'background:#fff' with 'background: var(--card-bg)'. If the patent thumbnail needs a light backdrop for legibility, wrap the in a small white-padding container rather than styling the outer card.

issues_found.description: EXP-052 is missing from expansion-tracker.json (sequence jumps 051→053).
issues_found.suggested_fix: Check git log for any EXP-052 commit history. If it was intentionally skipped, document the reason in a tracker note. If lost, analyst should backfill the entry or confirm it was rolled into another EXP.

issues_found.description: 11 H2 headings in sections.json (all in part3) render outside <details>/<summary>.
issues_found.location: data/sections.json → part3.html (WIN category headers e.g. 3.2 Refuted by Data, 3.3 Self-Contradicted)
issues_found.suggested_fix: These are intentional structural separators inside the WIN-details tab, not collapsible content. Consider adding a 'structural_header' class or explicit exemption so the check can distinguish them from regressed prose TLDRs.

issues_found.description: monitor/prompts/reference/analyst-mode5-prospective.md exists only on workspace (never committed) and is not referenced from any prompt.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Either commit it and add a reference from analyst.md, or delete it as stale scaffolding. Low practical risk — no agent currently loads it.

issues_found.description: Workspace docs/index.html (mtime 02:29) is older than workspace data/wins.json (mtime 06:35), causing the workspace-side test.js run to fail 'HTML is not stale'.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Informational only. The git-side HTML is correct (fresh build reproduces it byte-for-byte). Next `build.js publish` or workspace-sync cycle will refresh the workspace copy.

summary: Overall PASS. Test suite (git side) green 3373/3373. Build reproducible: fresh-clone rebuild produces byte-identical docs/index.html (0 diff lines). Internal anchors, tab structure, data-prose verdict counts (9/14/22/18/4/4 = 71 matching scorecard exactly), WIN TLDR coverage, discoverability infrastructure (llms.txt, sitemap, robots, meta tags, ClaimReview), expansion-tracker next_id invariant, section-new coupling, digest pipeline, and workspace-sync direction guard all clean. Four moderate issues: two pre-existing hardcoded light-theme colors in sections.json (part1 #f5f5f5 formula block, part6 #fff Tesla patent card), an EXP-052 gap in the expansion tracker, and 11 H2 category headers in part3 that sit outside <details> (intentional structural headers, may warrant a class-based exemption). Three workspace-only files (WIN-019.c3, WIN-020.c3, EXP-182) are <30 min old — will be captured by the next workspace-sync. analyst-mode5-prospective.md remains an uncommitted orphan documentation file. No critical or major findings.
